meta.title: Introducing Yourself
meta.subtitle: Learn to introduce yourself in Spanish

steps.title: Making Connections
steps.body: Meeting new people is exciting! In this lesson, you'll learn how to introduce yourself and start conversations in Spanish. 🤝

steps.title: My Name Is...
steps.body:
There are two common ways to say your name:

• **Me llamo...** - My name is... (literally: 'I call myself')
• **Soy...** - I am...

Example: **Me llamo María** or **Soy María**

steps.title: What's Your Name?
steps.body:
To ask someone's name:

**Informal:** ¿Cómo te llamas? (How do you call yourself?)
**Formal:** ¿Cómo se llama usted?

Or simply: **¿Cuál es tu nombre?** (What is your name?)

steps.title: Nice to Meet You!
steps.body:
After introductions, say:

• **Mucho gusto** - Nice to meet you (most common)
• **Encantado** - Delighted (if you're male)
• **Encantada** - Delighted (if you're female)
• **Es un placer** - It's a pleasure
steps.audioPhrase: Mucho gusto. Encantado. Encantada. Es un placer.

steps.title: Complete the Sentence
steps.hint: Use 'Me' for yourself, 'te' for the other person

steps.title: Where Are You From?
steps.body:
To ask and answer about origin:

**¿De dónde eres?** - Where are you from? (informal)
**Soy de...** - I am from...

Example: **Soy de Estados Unidos** (I'm from the United States)
steps.audioPhrase: ¿De dónde eres? Soy de Estados Unidos.

steps.title: Countries in Spanish
steps.body:
Common country names:

• Estados Unidos - United States
• México - Mexico
• España - Spain
• Inglaterra - England
• Francia - France
• Alemania - Germany

steps.title: Quick Quiz
steps.question: How do you ask 'What's your name?' informally?

steps.title: Full Introduction
steps.phrase: ¡Hola! Me llamo Ana. Soy de México. Mucho gusto.
steps.translation: Hello! My name is Ana. I'm from Mexico. Nice to meet you.
steps.audioPhrase: ¡Hola! Me llamo Ana. Soy de México. Mucho gusto.

steps.title: Great Progress!
steps.body:
You've learned:
✓ Two ways to say your name
✓ How to ask someone's name
✓ Pleasantries after meeting
✓ How to say where you're from

steps.title: 🎉 ¡Fantástico!
steps.body:
You can now introduce yourself completely in Spanish! Next time you meet a Spanish speaker, try out your new skills. They'll be impressed! 🌟

**Challenge:** Practice introducing yourself out loud 3 times today!
